category_sources: source_facts.description says interactive command-line tool for using emoji in commit messages; official gitmoji site is an emoji guide for commit messages and official CLI README describes interactive commit usage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.source-archive is the gitmoji-cli npm package; official GitHub repository title is gitmoji-cli.
docs_sources: Official gitmoji-cli README documents install, usage, commit, search, list, update, and config; official gitmoji.dev provides the commit-message emoji guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is gitmoji-cli and the official gitmoji.dev site links to Carlos Cuesta's GitHub project ecosystem.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, official gitmoji.dev guide, and official gitmoji-cli README identify emoji-based commit-message workflow.
